most_positive.title:
XI JINPING PUSHES GLOBAL AI COLLAB OVER SOLO PLAY   
 
Chinese President Xi Jinping at WAIC called for international AI cooperation instead of any one country’s “solo performance” while touting new Moonshot Kimi K3 model.   
 
🔹 Highlights World AI Cooperation Organization with 29 countries and support for developing nations   
🔹 Kimi K3 launches as world’s largest open-source AI with 2.8T parameters claiming edge over Anthropic OpenAI   
🔹 Comes amid US chip export limits as $NVDA $AMD shipments to China remain tightly controlled   
🔹 Beijing accelerating tech autonomy push in the AI race   
 
$NVDA $AMD exposure in the mix as geopolitics meets massive model competition.
Nvidia May Be the Most Valuable Company in the World, but It Looks Like a Bargain Compared to These 3 Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stocks - The Motley Fool
The Great Rotation Is Here. Why Money Is Fleeing Chips for Old Favorites.
